subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the Merciful! Give thanks unto God that ye have set foot upon the arena of existence in this most blessed and auspicious age [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء رحمن شکر کنید خدا را که در چنین عصر میمنتحصری بعرصه وجود قدم نهادید
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @thankfulness; gratitude, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
